source: Cropped from approved six-panel concept art generation

assets.description: Top-left tile. Celestial luxury chess board with gold/black pieces in a moonlit cosmic chamber. Use as concept art for premium SpiritVerse chess experience.

recommended_usage.implementation_note: Use as premium board/scene concept reference. For final in-game implementation, Codex may crop, scale, and layer UI or generate derivative board/piece assets from this reference.

notes: These are concept scene images, not isolated sprite sheets.
Best for immediate implementation as board/scene backdrops, splash cards, or visual references for higher-fidelity game asset builds.
File names are stable and Codex-friendly.
